title: Real Estate Agent

rationales.taskAutomation: Listing descriptions, comparative market analyses, and basic paperwork are automatable, but showings, negotiation, and local trust-building gate most of the role's core work.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI listing-description tools, automated valuation models, and virtual staging are credible, fast-improving products, though not yet fully mature across the industry.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is growing among brokerages but remains uneven given the independent-contractor structure of the profession.
rationales.agenticExposure: Back-office slices like CMA generation, listing copy, and showing scheduling are agent-ownable, but negotiation and client relationships are outside current agent reach.

tasksAtRisk: Listing description and marketing copy generation
tasksGrowing: Local market expertise and pricing judgment
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 41-9022 Real Estate Sales Agents, p25-p75 rounded (highly commission-variable)

defenseSkills.skill: AI Listing & Valuation Tools (AVMs, virtual staging)

insight: AI now writes the listing and pulls the comps in minutes. It still doesn't walk a nervous buyer through a bidding war or negotiate a contingency at 9pm.
